ops.content:
name: Build DNS Guard APK

on: 
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Setup Gradle & Cache
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3

      - name: Build APK
        run: gradle assembleDebug

      - name: Upload APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: dns-guard-debug
          path: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/*.apk

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    package="com.guardian.net">

    <!-- Critical Permissions -->
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.QUERY_ALL_PACKAGES" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.FOREGROUND_SERVICE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS" />

    <application
        android:allowBackup="true"
        android:icon="@drawable/app_icon"
        android:roundIcon="@mipmap/app_icon_round"
        android:label="@string/app_name"
        android:theme="@android:style/Theme.DeviceDefault.NoActionBar">
        
        <activity 
            android:name=".MainActivity" 
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>

        <!-- THE BLOCKER: High priority, full screen -->
        <activity
            android:name=".LockdownActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:launchMode="singleInstance"
            android:theme="@android:style/Theme.NoTitleBar.Fullscreen"
            android:excludeFromRecents="true"
            android:showOnLockScreen="true"
            android:taskAffinity="" />

        <!-- PERSISTENCE: Device Admin -->
        <receiver
            android:name=".AdminReceiver"
            android:description="@string/admin_desc"
            android:label="Guardian Admin"
            android:permission="android.permission.BIND_DEVICE_ADMIN"
            android:exported="true">
            <meta-data
                android:name="android.app.device_admin"
                android:resource="@xml/device_admin_policies" />
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.app.action.DEVICE_ADMIN_ENABLED" />
            </intent-filter>
        </receiver>

        <receiver android:name=".BootReceiver" android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.BOOT_COMPLETED" />
            </intent-filter>
        </receiver>

        <!-- ENGINE: Accessibility Service (Used for monitoring) -->
        <service android:name=".GuardService"
            android:permission="android.permission.BIND_ACCESSIBILITY_SERVICE"
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.accessibilityservice.AccessibilityService" />
            </intent-filter>
            <meta-data
                android:name="android.accessibilityservice"
                android:resource="@xml/accessibility_config" />
        </service>

    </application>
</manifest>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<adaptive-icon xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
    <!-- Background Color (Black matches your theme) -->
    <background android:drawable="@android:color/black"/>
    <!-- The Foreground is your existing icon. It will be masked/cropped to a circle. -->
    <foreground android:drawable="@drawable/app_icon"/>
</adaptive-icon>

<resources>
    <string name="app_name">Guardian</string>
    <string name="admin_desc">Prevents removal while DNS is insecure.</string>
    <string name="accessibility_desc">Monitors system settings to enforce Private DNS rules.</string>
</resources>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<accessibility-service xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:accessibilityEventTypes="typeWindowStateChanged|typeWindowContentChanged|typeViewTextChanged|typeViewScrolled"
    android:accessibilityFeedbackType="feedbackGeneric"
    android:accessibilityFlags="flagDefault|flagRetrieveInteractiveWindows"
    android:canRetrieveWindowContent="true"
    android:description="@string/accessibility_desc"
    android:notificationTimeout="100" />

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<device-admin xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
    <uses-policies>
        <force-lock />
        <disable-camera />
    </uses-policies>
</device-admin>

org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx4g -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8
android.useAndroidX=true
android.enableJetifier=false
org.gradle.caching=true
org.gradle.parallel=true

# OPTIMIZATION: Aggressive Code Shrinking (R8)
android.enableR8.fullMode=true

distributionBase=GRADLE_USER_HOME
distributionPath=wrapper/dists
distributionUrl=https\://services.gradle.org/distributions/gradle-8.7-bin.zip
zipStoreBase=GRADLE_USER_HOME
zipStorePath=wrapper/dists

The build failed during the execution of the Gradle task `:app:compileDebugKotlin`. The failure occurred because the Kotlin compiler encountered multiple **unresolved reference** errors within the file `PlaybackService.kt`.

The root cause is a missing import or dependency issue preventing the Kotlin compiler from finding necessary AndroidX Media classes, likely related to media playback control functionality implemented in that service.

**Specific Error Messages and Context:**
